summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All 51 backend tests pass (100%) including 3 new event deduplication tests. All UI tests pass: Dashboard and Telemetry tabs have fixed row heights with no panel overlap, Events tab shows deduplicated events with (xN) count, IMU_UPDATE/SYS_HEARTBEAT filtered out, drone roll is near 0 (right-side up), all 7 tabs working, Settings has SIM badges and working sliders.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

Dashboard Row 2 (Camera, MAVLink, Performance) has fixed 220px height - VERIFIED
Dashboard Row 3 (Events) has fixed 150px height with scrollable content - VERIFIED
No panel overlap between rows (8px gap measured between Row 1 bottom and Row 2 top) - VERIFIED
All sensor panels (IMU, BARO, GPS, RANGE/FLOW) have overflow-hidden - VERIFIED
Camera, MAVLink, Performance panels have overflow-hidden - VERIFIED
Telemetry Charts row (300px) and Sensors row (220px) are separate - VERIFIED
Events tab shows deduplicated events with (xN) count suffix - VERIFIED (e.g., 'Obstacle proximity alert! (x24)')
IMU_UPDATE events are filtered out from display - VERIFIED
SYS_HEARTBEAT events are filtered out from display - VERIFIED
GET /api/events returns deduplicated events with count suffix - VERIFIED
All 7 tabs work: Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings - VERIFIED
Settings tab: Simulator sliders work correctly - VERIFIED
Settings tab: HW/SIM badges show SIM for all 5 sensors - VERIFIED
3D drone is right-side up (roll=0.18°, near 0) - VERIFIED
All 51 backend pytest tests pass (48 existing + 3 new event deduplication tests)

Telemetry tab rows (300px, 220px) correctly separated with no overlap
All panel components have h-full overflow-hidden classes applied correctly
_filter_events() in server.py correctly deduplicates events with (xN) count suffix
_filter_events() correctly filters out IMU_UPDATE and SYS_HEARTBEAT noise events
Event deduplication groups same (type, message) pairs preserving latest timestamp
Console chart dimension warnings are cosmetic and don't affect functionality
